name: Peanut Butter Layered Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Microwave unsweetened chocolate and 3/4 cup margarine in a large microwaveable bowl on HIGH for 2 minutes, or until the margarine is melted. Stir until the chocolate is completely melted.
3. Add granulated sugar to the melted chocolate mixture. Mix in eggs and 1 teaspoon vanilla until well blended.
4. Stir in flour and chopped peanuts. Spread batter into a greased 13x9 inches pan.
5. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out with fudgey crumbs. Do not overbake.
6. Allow to cool in the pan.
7. Mix peanut butter, powdered sugar, and 1 teaspoon vanilla in a separate bowl until well blended and smooth.
8. Spread mixture over brownies.
9. Microwave semi-sweet chocolate and 1/4 cup margarine in a small microwaveable bowl on HIGH for 2 minutes, or until the margarine is melted. Stir until the chocolate is completely melted.
10. Spread melted chocolate over the peanut butter layer.
11. Allow to cool until set. Cut into squares.
